allow: Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(l\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => k.match\(/^\(Link|External|Globe|Share|User|At|Hash|Code|Terminal|Rss|Wifi|Radio|Broadcast|Network|Contact|Profile|Social|Link2\)/i\)\).filter\(k => !k.includes\('Icon'\) && !k.includes\('Lucide'\)\)\)")
